action.reasoning: Observation: Robot finds human at step 71 but only gets 138 safe steps in 690 steps. It loses the human repeatedly (dist goes to 3-4m). 32 scene collisions cause early termination. found_human_rate=17.8%. Analysis: The controller is too slow to keep up with the moving human. When the human walks away, the robot falls behind. Also, collisions with walls/furniture cause early episode termination. Need: (1) much more aggressive pursuit, (2) simultaneous turning+moving, (3) use depth sensor for collision avoidance, (4) target closer distance (1.3m). Decision: Completely rewrite the controller with these improvements, test locally, then submit eval.
